members.name: Karma Lekshe Tsomo
members.card: Co-founder of Sakyadhita; professor, University of San Diego.
members.bio: Karma Lekshe Tsomo is a professor of Buddhist Studies at the University of San Diego. She received the precepts of a novice nun in France in 1977 and full ordination in Korea in 1982. She studied Buddhism in Dharamsala for 15 years and received a doctorate in Comparative Philosophy from the University of Hawai'i in 2000. She is a founder and past president of Sakyadhita and director of Jamyang Foundation, an innovative education project for women in developing countries.

members.name: Christie Yuling Chang
members.card: Taiwanese scholar and longtime Sakyadhita leader.
members.bio: Christie Yuling Chang is a Taiwanese Buddhist scholar who has served Sakyadhita in several leadership roles, including as Vice President during the 2000–2009 term.

members.name: Carol Stevens
members.card: Served on the Sakyadhita Executive Committee.
members.bio: Carol Stevens served as Secretary on the Sakyadhita Executive Committee during the 2000–2009 term.

members.name: Rebecca Paxton
members.card: Served on the Sakyadhita Executive Committee.
members.bio: Rebecca Paxton served as Treasurer on the Sakyadhita Executive Committee during the 2000–2009 term.
